user.title: Connect to Plex (v2)
user.description: Click Submit to start the Plex PIN authentication. No token needed.

auth_wait.title: Authorize Plex Watch
auth_wait.description:
1. Copy the URL below and open it in your browser
2. Sign in to Plex and authorize
3. Come back here and click Submit

data.plex_url: Authorization URL (copy and open in browser)

select_server.title: Select Plex Server
select_server.description: Choose the Plex server to monitor.

data.use_local: Allow local network connections (only enable if HA is on the same LAN as Plex)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Plex. Check your network.
error.auth_not_completed: Authorization not completed yet. Authorize in the browser first, then click Submit.
error.no_servers: No Plex servers found for this account.

abort.already_configured: This Plex server is already configured.

data.use_local: Allow local network connections (only enable if HA is on the same LAN as Plex)
data.watched_series: Series to follow — comma-separated (e.g. Dragon Ball Z, One Piece). Leave empty to disable new-episode alerts.
